name: chess-with-ledger
description: Local and online multiplayer chess with an immutable DynamoDB ledger and PostgreSQL match statistics.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @chess-ledger/shared && npm run build --workspace @chess-ledger/api && npm run build --workspace @chess-ledger/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @chess-ledger/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @chess-ledger/web
scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n api,web "npm run start:dev --workspace @chess-ledger/api" "npm run dev --workspace @chess-ledger/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run start:dev --workspace @chess-ledger/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @chess-ledger/web
